feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Query SalesPriceList result not the same behavior in Custom BO and Before Save
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a script where I am calling the SalesPriceList Query in custom BO and before save of customer contract

here is the sample code below

var initQuery = SalesPriceList.QueryByGroupCode;
var initSelParams = initQuery.CreateSelectionParams();
initSelParams.Add(initQuery.GroupCode.content, "I", "EQ", "PLPRICE1");
var initQueryResult = initQuery.ExecuteDataOnly(initSelParams);

var query = SalesPriceList.QueryByTypeCodeAndPropertyIDAndPropertyValue;
var selParams = query.CreateSelectionParams();

// Filter by TypeCode for Base Price List
selParams.Add(query.TypeCode.content, "I", "EQ", "7PL0");

selParams.Add(query.ValidityPeriod.StartTimePoint.Date, "I", "GE", currentDate);
selParams.Add(query.ValidityPeriod.EndTimePoint.Date, "I", "LE", currentDate);

var queryPriceList_Results = query.Execute(selParams);

if (queryPriceList_Results.Count() > 0) {
foreach (var pricing in queryPriceList_Results) {
var pricelist = pricing.PriceSpecification;

--the rest of the logic

}

}

The problem is in my custom BO the PriceSpecification is returning a value. But in before save it is blank.

Can you help me what is the reason why it is not working eve nif the code is the same?

 

Regards,

Carlo

entry.title: Terminated Employee Appearing in Employee Search in PP2
entry.content: In the pp2 budget workbook, terminated employees are appearing in the employee search results. During our testing, we searched for employee  who is a terminated employee, and the employee was returned in the search results.

entry.title: iOS Simulator crashes with reference error in sap service and asset manager application v2405.
entry.content:
We are trying to run iOS simulator for SAP SSAM 2405 branded client but it's getting crashed with below error:

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Restarting application on device D8F8AA9C-4A4B-4783-AECF-938F971D6FC3...

  ***** Fatal JavaScript exception - application has been terminated. *****

  NativeScript encountered a fatal error:

  Error calling module function

  Error calling module function

  ReferenceError: UIContentSizeCategorySmall is not defined

  File: (file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/webpack/bootstrap:27:0)

  StackTrace:

  ./node_modules/@nativescript/core/accessibility/font-scale.ios.js(file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/node_modules/@nativescript/core/accessibility/font-scale.ios.js:30:0)

  at __webpack_require__(file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/webpack/bootstrap:24:0)

  at fn(file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/webpack/runtime/hot module replacement:61:0)

  at ./node_modules/@nativescript/core/accessibility/accessibi

entry.title: Assistance Required for Debugging Cloud Build APK
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have built a custom client using Cloud Build. Could you please guide us on how to perform debugging using the Cloud Build APK?

Your assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Problem in extending V4 RAP service to List Report UI via CAPM Layer
entry.content:
I have created a Managed scenario in RAP and used V4 service binding. Then I created a CAP project in BAS consuming that V4 service and metadata. In service.cds and service.js too, I didn't added any custom functionality, just basic entity projection in service.cds and basic tx function for all methods (CREATE, READ, UPDATE and DELETE) in service.js as I want to use the CRUD functionalities offered by Managed RAP scenario directly. 

Then I created a List Report Application using Local CAP Project and consuming this CAP project mentioned above. 

Now when I am previewing this application, no data is showing in the List Report by clicking GO button. If I click on Create Button, Object page is always in busy state and never loads. But If I load the Fiori Preview in RAP, all CRUD operations works fine. 

In the Console, these errors come while loading the site from cds watch in BAS - 

Can anyone help what else should be done and where? And CAP layer is required for my Requirement as I have to implement roles and securities and other security related stuff. Directly coonecting FIori App to local system and consuming service is not a feasible solution for me

entry.title: Data not coming in FinOps dashboard in BTP Build WorkZone
entry.content:
Hi Support Team,

We are trying to build FinOps dashboard in BTP by following the steps given on the link SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor: Monitors the CPEA credit consumption of your global account and alerts on increased usage 

Note -

  • We have BAS and Build WorkZone in separate Subaccount of BTP. I have deployed the BAS project in Cloud and created the Site in Build Work Zone and assigned the role BTP Resource Consumption Role and Launchpad related required role to the Build WorkZone user. 
  • SAC Content we are ignoring for now.

FinOps Dashboard is now available in Build WorkZone as attached, but Tiles are not showing any data.

As per my understanding, its due to missing role BTPResourceConsumption Viewer in Build WorkZone but same role is present in Subaccount where BAS resides. It seems we are facing this issue because BAS and WorkZone are in different subaccount.

How can we get the data in Dashboard in WorkZone site and how to access this role in WorkZone Subaccount? Please advice.

Site UR

entry.title: Data not coming in FinOps dashboard in BTP Build WorkZone
entry.content:
Hi Support Team,

We are trying to build FinOps dashboard in BTP by following the steps given on the link SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor: Monitors the CPEA credit consumption of your global account and alerts on increased usage 

Note -

  • We have BAS and Build WorkZone in separate Subaccount of BTP. I have deployed the BAS project in Cloud and created the Site in Build Work Zone and assigned the role BTP Resource Consumption Role and Launchpad related required role to the Build WorkZone user. 
  • SAC Content we are ignoring for now.

FinOps Dashboard is now available in Build WorkZone as attached, but Tiles are not showing any data.

As per my understanding, its due to missing role BTPResourceConsumption Viewer in Build WorkZone but same role is present in Subaccount where BAS resides. It seems we are facing this issue because BAS and WorkZone are in different subaccount.

How can we get the data in Dashboard in WorkZone site and how to access this role in WorkZone Subaccount? Please advice.

Site UR

entry.title: Unable to add BAS tool in my BTP Subaccount
entry.content:
Unable to add BAS tool in my BTP Subaccount.

Login in BTP Cockpit, from my Global account --> Booster --> SAP business Application Studio --> Start -->Prerequisite failed --> Checking Entitlements 

getting below message - 

Purchase the missing plan(s) to make it available in your global account, and then use the Entitlements page in the cockpit to distribute it to the subaccounts where you would like to execute this booster.

entry.title: Extensibility Options for Fiori App F4419 – Manage Requests for Long-Term Supplier’s Declarations
entry.content:
We are currently reviewing the extensibility options for SAP Fiori app F4419 – Manage Requests for Long-Term Supplier’s Declarations.

Technical details:

  • BSP Application: LLS_LTSDREQ_MNG
  • OData Service: LLS_LTSDREQUEST_MNG 
  • Application Component: FT_LEG_PRE_SDM

The SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library does not show any documented extension points for this app.

We have two requirements:

  1. We need to save additional custom information in a custom table when a supplier declaration request is created. Is there a supported BAdI, enhancement spot, business event, API, or backend extension point available during or after request creation?
  2. We need to control or limit the number of agreements included in a request, possibly based on the logged-in user or on a value selected by the user through a pop-up before creation. Is there a supported way to implement this through a backend validation or a Fiori elements/UI extension?
  3. If 1 and 2 are possible, are these done via SEGW or via ABAP RAP?

We are looking for an upgrade-safe solution and would prefer to avoid modifying SAP standard UI5, OData, or backend objects.

entry.title: Company code field to be made mandatory
entry.content:
Currently, the Company Code field in the Guided Sourcing project creation is not mandatory. However, this information is essential for successful integration with our backend systems.

Could you please assist in configuring the system so that the Company Code becomes a mandatory field during project creation?

For your reference, I have attached a screenshot of the current UI showing this field.

entry.title: UI facets for creating tabs are not working in ECC 7.5 non-HANA system.
entry.content:
I am trying to create multiple tabs using UI facets in ECC 7.5 non-HANA system, but the @ui.facet annotations, including COLLECTION and IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE, are not functioning properly. I have followed the typical annotation approach but the facets or tabs do not display as expected. I suspect it might be related to UI5 version issues or incorrect annotation structure.
Attached are the screenshot as well for Fiori app
Below is the CDS code:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZISPFLIDETAILS'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'SPLI Details'
@vdm.viewType: #CONSUMPTION
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@odata.publish: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
serviceQuality: #X,
sizeCategory: #S,
dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view ZI_SPFLI_DETAILS as select from spfli
{

@ui : {
lineItem : [{position: 10, importance: #HIGH}]
}
@EndUserText.label: 'PO'
key carrid as AirlineCode,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 20, value: 'FlightNo' }]
@EndUserText.label: 'Flight ConnNo'
key connid as FlightNo,


@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 30, label: 'Country From' }]
countryfr as Countryfr,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 40, label: 'City From' }]
cityfrom as Cityfrom,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 50, label: 'Airport From' }]
airpfrom as Airpfrom,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 60, label: 'Country TO' }]
countryto as Countryto,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 70, label: 'City To' }]
cityto as Cityto,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 80, label: 'Airport TO' }]
airpto as Airpto,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 90, label: 'Dep Time' }]
deptime as Deptime,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 100, label: 'Arrival Time' }]
arrtime as Arrtime,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 110, label: 'Distance' }]
distance as Distance,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 120, label: 'DistId' }]
distid as Distid,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 130, label: 'Flight type' }]
fltype as Fltype,
@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 140, label: 'Period' }]
period as Period
}

entry.title: Adding local annotations in BAS adaptation project fails
entry.content: We are adapting app F0702A for S/4 Hana 2022 SP01. When adding local annotations to adaptation project via BAS using the documented approach, the local annotation file does not load in the preview. The documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/developing-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-business-application-studio/adding-local-annotation-files?locale=en-US

entry.title: failing since yesterday npm install @sap-rfc/node-rfc-library
entry.content: npm install @SAP-rfc/node-rfc-library This command is failing since yesterday, even if .npmrc file is updated with correct user and password. Password is still active. And before yesterday it was working fine

entry.title: Unable to UI5 freestyle application using Joule
entry.content:
we are unable to generate ui5 app using Joule>Getting below Error 

Failed to generate app proposal: Cannot find package '@ui5/mcp-server' imported from /extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/sap-ux-help-extension-1.28.0/dist/extension-min.cjs Did you mean to import "@ui5/mcp-server/lib/api.js"?

entry.title: Unable to UI5 freestyle application using Joule
entry.content: we are unable to generate ui5 app using Joule

entry.title: Unable to create an UI5 Freestyle App using Joule in BAS
entry.content:
In BAS, when tried to create a UI5 Freestyle app from scratch using joule getting below error

 

Failed to generate app proposal: Cannot find package '@ui5/mcp-server' imported from /extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/sap-ux-help-extension-1.28.0/dist/extension-min.cjs Did you mean to import "@ui5/mcp-server/lib/api.js"?

entry.title: SAP Build Code BAS -/ui5-create-app fails with "@ui5/mcp-server" error and Accept Application button
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to create a freestyle SAPUI5 application in SAP Build Code (BAS) using the new Joule command:
/ui5-create-app

Prompt used

/ui5-create-app Create a freestyle SAPUI5 application for the Manage Sales Order CAP service.
Use the OData V4 service:
/service/manage_Sales_Order_App

CAP Project Information
I already have a CAP project generated successfully using Joule.
Project structure:
db/
srv/
app/
The OData service is available and generated correctly.

Joule Response
Joule returns the following proposal:
Let's configure your Manage Sales Order app using JavaScript instead of TypeScript.
Namespace: com.myorg.managesalesorder
Base Path:
/home/user/projects/Manage_Sales_Order_App/app
Create App Directory: true
OData V4 URL:
service/manage_Sales_Order_App/
OData Entity Set:
SalesOrders
TypeScript: false
Once you're ready, you can accept the application proposal
by pressing the "Accept Application" button.
Issue
The "Accept Application" button never appears.

At the same time, I can see the following error in the BAS Error panel:
Failed to generate app proposal:

Cannot find package '@ui5/mcp-server'
imported from

/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/
sap-ux-help-extension-1.28.0/dist/extension-min.cjs

Did you mean to import
"@ui5/mcp-server/lib/api.js"?

Source:
SAP Fiori Tools - Guided Development

Troubleshooting Performed
I have already tried:

Refreshing BAS browser window
Opening a new Joule conversation
Using a simplified /ui5-create-app prompt
Creating a new Development Space
Reopening the project

The same error occurs every time.

Environment
SAP Build Code / SAP Business Application Studio
SAP Fiori Tools - Guided Development
Extension version reported in error:
sap-ux-help-extension-1.28.0
Questions
Is this a known issue with the SAP Fiori Tools / UI5 Create Application assistant?
Has anyone encountered the missing package error:
@ui5/mcp-server
Is there any workaround available until the issue is fixed?
Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Joule in SAP Business Application Studio fails to generate app proposal
entry.content:
SAP Joule in SAP Business Application Studio fails to generate app proposal

Error:Cannot find package '@ui5/mcp-server' imported from:/extbin/local/openvscode-server/extensions/sap-ux-help-extension-1.28.0/dist/extension-min.cjsEnvironment:Node.js: v22.13.1SAP UX Help Extension: sap-ux-help-extension-1.28.0Project: supplier-portal@ui5/mcp-server: 0.2.14 installed locally and globallyValidation performed:npm root -g returns:/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modulesnpm root returns:/home/user/projects/supplier-portal/node_modulesnpm list @ui5/mcp-server returns:@ui5/mcp-server@0.2.14npx -y @ui5/mcp-server returns:Usage: ui5mcpDirect import tests fail because package root/subpath is not exported:ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED

entry.title: Msg no. -M7181 Warning to Error in Reservation
entry.content: In Public cloud How we change config Msg no. -M7181 Warning to Error in Reservation

entry.title: Integrate SAP Audit Log Service in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can we integrate Integrate SAP Audit Log Service in Cloud ALM? 

We want to see the SAP Audit Log Service details in the dashboard format

Regards,

MK
